title: Cobblemon Universe
description: 🌌 Cobblemon and optimization mods like sodium, lithium, etc for fabric 1.21.1
body:
🌌 Cobblemon Universe | Minecraft 1.21.1 (Fabric) 🌌

Welcome to Cobblemon Universe – a lightweight yet immersive Cobblemon experience crafted especially for low-end devices!

🔹 Version: Minecraft 1.21.1 (Fabric)
🔹 Core Mod: Cobblemon
🔹 Optimized with: Sodium, Lithium, and other performance-enhancing mods
🔹 RAM Requirement:
 ✔️ Minimum: 2GB
 ✔️ Recommended: 3GB for smooth and immersive gameplay

✨ Whether you're exploring vast biomes, catching Pokémon, or battling with friends, Cobblemon Universe ensures a smooth experience even on PCs with limited resources.

Perfect for casual trainers and performance-focused players alike — Join the Universe today!
